business.headline: DA hike delay: Is this normal or something to worry about?For many, a DA hike around this time is almost expected. But with no announcement yet, the delay is raising a simple question, i.e., is this normal, or is something different this time?

This has put pressure on imports of crude oil, natural gas and LPG into India.

entertainment.headline: Anne Hathaway's first thought on Devil Wears Prada 2: Did Meryl Streep read it? Actor Anne Hathaway shared her first reaction to The Devil Wears Prada 2 script, but her initial thought about Meryl Streep is what's grabbing attention.

general news.headline: Iran rejects ceasefire in response to US proposal sent via PakistanIran's reply is structured as a 10-clause framework that goes beyond an immediate ceasefire. It includes demands for an end to conflicts across the region, protocols to ensure safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz, the lifting of sanctions, and provisions for reconstruction.

9 Tamil Nadu cops get death sentence for 2020 father-son custodial torture, killingThe Madurai Bench of the Madras High Court has sentenced nine Tamil Nadu policemen to death in the 2020 Sathankulam custodial killing case of father-son duo Jayaraj and Benniks.

Can't place yourself so high: SC raps top Bengal officers over Malda responseJustice Bagchi rebuked the Chief Secretary for inaccessibility, saying the Chief Justice must be reachable. The CJI ordered a written apology from top officials, calling it an administrative failure. The court noted hours of failed contact as judicial officers were held hostage, terming it evidence of bureaucratic chaos.

Artemis 2 reaches the Moon, set to break record for farthest human spaceflightThe Artemis-II crew has reached the Moon's gravitational sphere of influence. This mission is set to break the record for farthest human spaceflight, reaching a distance of 4,06,773 kilometres from Earth.

Danger at every step: Airman's rescue mission is red flag for Trump's Iran plansThe US might have succeeded in rescuing a wounded F-15E airman from within Iran, but the risk and cost involved in the mission might be the biggest red flag for President Trump's plan to launch a ground operation. This is why.

Live: Iran's petrochemical complex hit in US-Israel strikes, 2nd attack in a dayUS-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: US President Donald Trump has escalated tensions with Iran, warning that "power plants and bridges" could be targeted if the Strait of Hormuz is not reopened by Tuesday evening, saying "Tuesday will be Power Plant Day, and Bridge Day, all wrapped up in one." Trump's abusive threat drew a sharp from Iranian parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, who warned that Trump's "reckless moves" risk dragging the country into living hell and insisting "you won't gain anything through war crimes." Behind the scenes, Oman has held urgent talks with Iran to ensure smooth flow of transit through war-hit Hormuz, while Pakistan and Egypt have kept diplomatic channels open between Washington and Tehran. At the same time, violence has intensified elsewhere, with Israeli strikes in Beirut killing at least four people and Hezbollah launching retaliatory attacks, escalating the conflict further. Follow IndiaToday.in for the latest updates.

Delhi assembly security breach: Car rams barricade, drops bouquet, drives outA Tata Sierra with a Uttar Pradesh registration spent about five minutes inside the Assembly complex before exiting through Gate No. 2. While the bouquet left behind inside the Assembly Speaker's car was found to be harmless, authorities have since traced the vehicle and taken the driver into custody.

Chinnaswamy Stadium on Sunday, a result that extended his run to seven consecutive losses as captain.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.
